name: cognis-payments-db
description: A stricter custom profile for databases that store cardholder-adjacent data in a regulated payments environment. All control identifiers (PAY-*) and wording are authored for cisbench and are not copied from any external standard; they merely express the intent commonly required of such systems.

checks.title: Transport encryption is mandatory
checks.remediation: Require TLS for every client connection; reject plaintext at the listener.

checks.title: Minimum TLS version is 1.2 or higher
checks.remediation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1 and SSL; negotiate only TLS 1.2+.

checks.title: Password minimum length is at least 16
checks.remediation: Raise the password policy minimum to 16 characters for payments-scope accounts.

checks.title: Failed-login lockout threshold is 5 or fewer
checks.remediation: Lock accounts after no more than 5 consecutive failed attempts.

checks.title: Anonymous login is disabled
checks.remediation: Disable anonymous and guest access entirely.

checks.title: Audit logging is enabled
checks.remediation: Enable audit logging for privileged and authentication events.

checks.title: Audit log retention is at least 365 days
checks.remediation: Retain audit records for at least one year for payments-scope systems.

checks.title: Data-at-rest encryption is enabled
checks.remediation: Enable transparent data-at-rest encryption for data files and backups.
